creator: kuriyama@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

After talking with Yoshiaki Uchikawa, I decided to commit this PR as 
lame-devel port.  This port will be obsoleted and audio/lame will be 
updated if this version become to see stable. 

I assign you as maintainer of this port.  I modified a little in Makefile 
from your PR.  So please re-submit PR you want more modification to this 
port. 

Thanks!
